use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ACUTE BACTERIAL SKIN AND SKIN STRUCTURE INFECTIONS CAUSED BY DESIGNATED SUSCEPTIBLE BACTERIA IN ADULTS

TREATING AN ACUTE BACTERIAL SKIN AND SKIN STRUCTURE INFECTION (ABSSSI) IN AN OVERWEIGHT OR OBESE PATIENT BY INTRAVENOUSLY (IV) ADMINISTERING 300MG OF DELAFLOXACIN OR A PHARMACEUTICALLY ACCEPTABLE SALT, TWICE A DAY
